Explicit Interface Implementations

AddVariable(string, object, bool)

Adds a variable to this item's collection given the variable name, value, and a flag that indicates whether the item URI's tag is prefixed with the variable name and separated by a period.

virtual void AddVariable(string VariableName, object vtVariableValue, bool bPrefixWithTag)

Parameters

VariableName string
vtVariableValue object
bPrefixWithTag bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AuxiliaryFieldValues

The field values corresponding to the AuxiliaryFields of the parent raster builder described by a property set that maps field names to fields values. These values take precedence over metadata from the BuilderItem's function raster dataset.

virtual IPropertySet AuxiliaryFieldValues { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Category

The catagory of builder item. The value in this property appears in the Category field of the mosaic catalog.

virtual esriRasterCatalogItemCategory Category { get; set; }

Returns

esriRasterCatalogItemCategory

Examples

Sample Snippet

ColorCorrectionProperties

Variables supporting color correction operation.

virtual IPropertySet ColorCorrectionProperties { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConvertToSupportedObject(esriArcGISVersion)

Convert the object to another object that is supported.

virtual object ConvertToSupportedObject(esriArcGISVersion docVersion)

Parameters

docVersion esriArcGISVersion

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Dataset

The function raster dataset associated with builder item.

virtual IFunctionRasterDataset Dataset { get; set; }

Returns

IFunctionRasterDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

DatasetName

The raster dataset name associated with builder item.

virtual IName DatasetName { get; set; }

Returns

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

Footprint

The footprint geometry of the function raster dataset that defines regions of valid pixels in the dataset. The footprint geometry may have a coordinate system different from the corresponding dataset.

virtual IGeometry Footprint { get; set; }

Returns

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasThumbnail

Indicates whether the builder item has a valid thumbnail.

virtual bool HasThumbnail { get; }

Returns

bool
